user_query:
I’m preparing an ICU quality improvement brief and need two cornerstone references integrated cleanly into a local draft. Please do the following, producing only the specified local artifacts.

1) Download two official guideline PDFs from the Internet:
   - Sepsis: an adult ICU sepsis management guideline issued by the Surviving Sepsis Campaign/Society of Critical Care Medicine (document title should contain “International Guidelines for Management of Sepsis and Septic Shock”). Save it as data/guidelines/sepsis_guideline.pdf.
   - Ventilator-associated complications: a guideline on preventing ventilator-associated pneumonia/events in acute-care/ICU settings issued by a national public health authority (e.g., CDC or NHS England). Save it as data/guidelines/ventilation_guideline.pdf.
   Do not include URLs in any output.

2) Create a structured manifest at outputs/guidelines_manifest.json capturing, for each PDF, the following JSON fields exactly:
   - id: "sepsis" or "ventilation"
   - source_organization: official organization name you identify (string)
   - document_title: title extracted from the PDF metadata or first page (string)
   - publication_year: four-digit year (integer)
   - saved_path: the relative path where you saved the PDF (string)
   - file_size_bytes: size of the saved file in bytes (integer)
   - sha256: SHA-256 hex digest of the saved file (string)
   - retrieved_at: ISO 8601 timestamp when you downloaded the file (string)
   Ensure all fields are present and non-empty, and that sha256 and file_size_bytes match the actual saved files.

3) Edit the provided input/draft_brief.md and write the updated brief to outputs/brief_updated.md by:
   - Replacing {{SEPSIS_TITLE}} and {{SEPSIS_YEAR}} with the sepsis document_title and publication_year from outputs/guidelines_manifest.json (id = "sepsis").
   - Replacing {{VENTILATION_TITLE}} and {{VENTILATION_YEAR}} with the ventilation document_title and publication_year from outputs/guidelines_manifest.json (id = "ventilation").
   - Replacing {{IMPLICATIONS}} with a single paragraph of 50–120 words that references both document titles exactly as they appear in the manifest, enclosed in double quotes, and briefly explains how implementing these recommendations could improve ICU patient outcomes.
   - Replacing {{FILE_TABLE}} with a two-column Markdown table with headers "file" and "sha256" and two rows (one per PDF). Use the manifest’s saved_path values under "file" and the full hex digest under "sha256".
   - Ensure the updated brief contains both exact titles from the manifest and no remaining {{...}} placeholders. Do not add any external links or URLs to the brief.

Deliverables to create:
- data/guidelines/sepsis_guideline.pdf
- data/guidelines/ventilation_guideline.pdf
- outputs/guidelines_manifest.json (schema as specified)
- outputs/brief_updated.md (placeholders replaced and paragraph added as specified)

Use only the two downloaded guidelines to populate titles and years; do not rely on any private systems or credentials. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
